files.patch:
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ SHELL := /bin/bash
 # `make` should build the binary by default.
 .DEFAULT_GOAL := build
 
-.PHONY: build fmt fmt-check lint test ci tools
+.PHONY: build gog fmt fmt-check lint test ci tools
 
 BIN_DIR := $(CURDIR)/bin
 BIN := $(BIN_DIR)/gog
@@ -23,6 +23,9 @@ build:
 	@mkdir -p $(BIN_DIR)
 	@go build -ldflags "$(LDFLAGS)" -o $(BIN) $(CMD)
 
+gog: build
+	@$(BIN) $(ARGS)
+
 tools:
 	@mkdir -p $(TOOLS_DIR)
 	@GOBIN=$(TOOLS_DIR) go install mvdan.cc/gofumpt@v0.9.2

@@ -687,13 +687,12 @@ Tip: if you want to avoid macOS Keychain prompts during these runs, set `GOG_KEY
 Build and run:
 
 ```bash
-make
-./bin/gog auth add you@gmail.com
+make gog ARGS='auth add you@gmail.com'
 ```
 
 For clean stdout when scripting:
 
-- `./bin/gog --json gmail search "from:me" | jq .`
+- `make gog ARGS='--json gmail search "from:me"' | jq .`
